mapper.insert: insert into products(category_id, name, description, price, stock, status, cover_url) values (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{status}, #{coverUrl})
mapper.select: select p.id, p.category_id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.stock, p.status, p.cover_url as coverUrl, p.created_at as createdAt, p.updated_at as updatedAt from products p left join categories c on p.category_id = c.id where p.id = #{id}

select p.id, p.category_id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.stock, p.status, p.cover_url as coverUrl, p.created_at as createdAt, p.updated_at as updatedAt from products p left join categories c on p.category_id = c.id where p.status = 'ON_SALE' order by p.created_at desc, p.id desc limit #{limit}

select p.id, p.category_id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.stock, p.status, p.cover_url as coverUrl, p.created_at as createdAt, p.updated_at as updatedAt from products p left join categories c on p.category_id = c.id
p.category_id = #{categoryId}
and p.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by p.price desc, p.id desc
order by p.price asc, p.id asc
order by p.created_at desc, p.id desc
order by p.created_at asc, p.id asc
order by p.id desc
order by p.id asc
limit #{offset}, #{size}
mapper.update: update products set category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, status = #{status}, cover_url = #{coverUrl} where id = #{id}
